test_cases.title: Enter plan mode with /plan command
test_cases.description: Verify that /plan command creates plan state and sets phase to brainstorming

test_cases.title: Enter plan mode without description
test_cases.description: Verify that /plan without args checks for existing plan files
steps: Check for existing plan files in /tmp
test_cases.expected_result: Shows existing plan files or enters plan mode

test_cases.title: Brainstorming code exploration before questions
test_cases.description: Verify AI explores code before asking user questions
test_cases.expected_result: AI executes code exploration before asking questions

test_cases.title: Brainstorming proposes 2-3 approaches
test_cases.description: Verify AI proposes multiple approaches with trade-offs

test_cases.title: Plan file chapter ordering
test_cases.description: Verify AI writes chapters in template order without skipping
test_cases.expected_result: Chapters written in template order, no skipping

test_cases.title: Plan file YAML frontmatter
test_cases.description: Verify plan file has correct YAML frontmatter
steps: Verify YAML frontmatter exists with template, created, status fields
test_cases.expected_result: YAML frontmatter contains template, created, status

test_cases.title: Abort plan mode via /plan abort
test_cases.description: Verify /plan abort cancels plan mode and resets state

test_cases.title: Plan tool abort action
test_cases.description: Verify plan tool abort action works correctly

test_cases.title: Complete with compact isolation
test_cases.description: Verify complete action triggers compact when user selects compact
test_cases.expected_result: Compact executed, steer injected with plan path

test_cases.title: Complete with direct isolation
test_cases.description: Verify complete action injects steer directly when user selects direct

test_cases.title: Complete with tree isolation
test_cases.description: Verify complete action with tree isolation only notifies, doesn't inject steer or start goal
test_cases.expected_result: Only notify user, no steer injection, no goal init

test_cases.title: Compact failure fallback
test_cases.description: Verify fallback to direct continue when compact fails

test_cases.title: Goal API initialization
test_cases.description: Verify __goalInit is called when goal extension is available

test_cases.title: List templates includes custom templates
test_cases.description: Verify list-template action discovers user custom templates

test_cases.title: Project template overrides global
test_cases.description: Verify project-level template overrides global template with same name
steps: Create same-name template in global and project dirs

test_cases.title: Multi-session state isolation
test_cases.description: Verify plan state is isolated between sessions
steps: Enter plan mode in session A
Enter plan mode in session B
test_cases.expected_result: Session A and B have independent states

test_cases.title: TUI shows Plan Mode label
test_cases.description: Verify TUI status bar shows [Plan Mode] when active

test_cases.title: TUI hides label when inactive
test_cases.description: Verify TUI status bar hides label when plan mode is not active

test_cases.title: Invalid action returns error
test_cases.description: Verify plan tool returns error for unknown action

test_cases.title: Template not found returns error
test_cases.description: Verify select-template returns error for non-existent template
steps: Call plan tool select-template with templateName='nonexistent'
